case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LEIVIN SAMUEL CRUZ MARQUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPEICALIST. DEFENDANT LEIVIN SAMUEL CRUZ MARQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARQUEZ, LEIVIN SAMUEL CRUZ $836.06 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $916.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
